checkin.journal:
Cool day, we had a really cool breakfast, um sausage so it was really good. Um I did have some bloating but it wasn't out of proportions also considering what I ate, um kaiser hits and everything. Yeah it was bloating late afternoon but I was still okay. Overall a good day managed to pay the providers happy happy August crypto prices went down.
Bloating was mostly from 5 to 8, yeah, I guess lunch or breakfast around 4 out of 10.
